definition:
1. an apparition, phantom , (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; φ. ἀνδρός the spectral appearance  of a man, (Herdotus Historicus):—; a vision  in a dream, (Aeschulus Tragicus), etc. 
2. a sign from heaven, portent, omen , (Herdotus Historicus); periphrastic, φάσμα ταύρου a monster  of a bull, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
